description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Reusable audience-consensus backplane for live co-creation: a tested real-time Socket.io core with parameter bus, weighted consensus, performer override, React participation surfaces, deployment scaffolding, and a generative-music proof path for venue, classroom, installation, and grant-funded pilots.
ranked.first_task: Ship a reproducible alpha demo that starts the core engine and the generative-music audience/performer flow from a fresh install, adds non-empty smoke/integration tests for that demo, and documents the exact local-to-venue runbook as the first publishable package boundary.
